name: Shrimp and Cheese Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs and water, beating with a wire whisk; set mixture aside.
2. Heat an 8-inch omelet pan or nonstick skillet over medium heat until hot enough to sizzle a drop of water. Add butter, and rotate pan to coat the bottom.
3. Pour egg mixture into the pan. As it starts to cook, gently lift the edges of the omelet with a spatula and tilt the pan so that the uncooked portion flows underneath.
4. Sprinkle half of the omelet with shrimp and the remaining ingredients (cheese, green onions, and parsley).
5. Fold in half and transfer the omelet to a serving plate.
6. Garnish with whole shrimp and sliced green onions, if desired. Serve immediately.
